# awscc_novaact_workflow_definition (Data Source)

Data Source schema for AWS::NovaAct::WorkflowDefinition



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Uniquely identifies the resource.

### Read-Only

- `arn` (String) The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the workflow definition.
- `created_at` (String) The timestamp when the workflow definition was created.
- `description` (String) An optional description of the workflow definition's purpose and functionality.
- `export_config` (Attributes) Configuration settings for exporting workflow execution data and logs to Amazon S3. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--export_config))
- `name` (String) The name of the workflow definition. Must be unique within your account and region.
- `status` (String) The current status of the workflow definition.

<a id="nestedatt--export_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `export_config`

Read-Only:

- `s3_bucket_name` (String) The name of the Amazon S3 bucket for exporting workflow data.
- `s3_key_prefix` (String) An optional prefix for Amazon S3 object keys to organize exported data.
